title: Hypickel SkyBloke (Hypixel Skyblock)
description: (1.21.11) PRIME CHOICE hypickle mods for ONLY PRO players LEGIT 100% unbannable free hype when installed
body:
![Very Original Art (Hand Drawn)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McqhMquH/images/e6204d374c097dca604c1d1f81a0895cf2d5e47a.png)

<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMER</summary>

This modpack does not guarantee protection from bans, kicks, or other punishments on any server. Use of this modpack may violate a server’s rules, and you are solely responsible for understanding and complying with the rules of any server you join. The creator of this modpack is not responsible for any bans, punishments, or other consequences that result from its use. This modpack does not provide free items, ranks, currency, or any other in‑game advantages from any server; any progression or rewards must be earned through normal gameplay and in accordance with server rules. Use at your own risk.

**Mods that update in-game can be compromised, only download directly from Modrinth.**

</details>

These are the mods I find to be almost necessary for Hypixel Skyblock (with some extras). They add general Minecraft and Skyblock specific quality of life features, user interface improvements, bugfixes, and attempt to optimize rendering/perfomance. Some gameplay features are still unconfigured, but they are present. I don’t enable settings that I think would get me banned. This includes certain automation and inputs that do more than one game action. Some examples are !warp commands and Mimic dead! messages.

Little Timmy version TBD

**Useful Keybinds and Commands**
- **P** - Pickup stash
- **O** - Search
- **C** - Zoom
- **/f1** - join Dungeons Floor 1->7
- **/m1** - join Master Mode Dungeons Floor 1->7
- **/k1** - join Kuudra Normal->Infernal
- **/sh gui** - opens SkyHanni GUI editor
- **/skyblocker bars** - opens SkyBlocker health GUI editor
- **/particlequality low/medium/high/extreme** - changes the packets per tick for particles Hypixel sends your client (low can cause fishing hotspots to disappear)

**Garden**
- **F** - locks the mouse in position
- **B** - teleports to the barn
- **H** - sethome
- **G** - teleports to your home

**Hovered Items**
- **J** - Price breakdown
- **L** - Lock slot
- **L + drag** - Bind slot (click to swap)
- **N** - lookup on AH/BZ

If you get kicked, there's a good chance you can disconnect and reconnect with the Stuck? proxy to get right back into SkyBlock. For configuration support, join the Discord server.
